reason: Merged PR #74 establishes the first accepted integrated sigmoid-enabled nm1 architecture-block physical result, using the reduced proxy target to produce real Nangate45 timing, area, and power metrics sufficient to unblock downstream Layer 2 activation-family measurement work.
next_action: unblock prop_l2_mapper_terminal_activation_family_v1 and queue its measurement_only nm1 activation-family reference item against the accepted integrated sigmoid architecture-block source
